# Real xorriso -as mkisofs output (xorriso 1.5.6), captured 2026-05-30 over a pipe.
# xorriso reports file COUNTS, never "% done", so the ISO-rebuild phase yields no
# parseable fraction on this toolchain -- xorriso_progress returns None for every
# line and the weight band simply completes at the step boundary.
xorriso : UPDATE :       6 files added in 1 seconds
ISO image produced: 12471 sectors
Written to medium : 12471 sectors at LBA 0
